summary: Verified existing implementation satisfies task-3 spec: on review-round escalation, run.mjs:1351-1352 calls buildEscalationSummary (title + round count + deduplicated findings table from handshake-round-N.json archives) and posts it via commentIssue(task.issueNumber, ...). Acceptance test in test/review-escalation.test.mjs asserts the posted comment body contains all three required parts (task title, round count phrase, dedup findings table) with verified dedup of overlapping findings across 3 rounds. Full suite: 582/582 pass.
